query:
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.role,
  ut.territory,
  ut.productLine,
  ut.states,
  ut.sectors
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN userTerritories ut ON ut.userId = u.id
WHERE u.id IN (1, 2550006, 3360134, 3360129, 13020010, 3870014, 3630009, 2820073, 4590008, 840008, 2340043)
ORDER BY u.name;
